creator: social@brandongrows.me
text: yuri@FreeBSD.org, I see that your audio/qsampler is the only port that depends on this. Would you have interest in maintaining this one with yours since both receive updates at the same time from the same upstream source? If not, I'd have no problem with maintaining it to gain some experience here that I can apply to the bigger, more complex ports I'm long-term interested in. Thanks
